title: BEM-833 execute after results

"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 21:05 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except: return {}
prev=load('governance/state/bem832_verify_results_after_831.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
if ps=='results_present':
    status='parse_results_next'; next_action='parse workflow_dispatch_results status files'
elif ps=='marker_present_no_results':
    status='patch_result_writer_next'; next_action='processor marker exists but no results; patch result writer'
else:
    status='patch_runner_placement_next'; next_action='processor marker missing; patch runner placement'
state={'bem':'BEM-833','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem833_execute_after_results_verify.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem833_execute_after_results_verify.md').write_text('# BEM-833 | Execute After Results Verify | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem833_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-833'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem833_execute_after_results_verify.json','governance/reports/bem833_execute_after_results_verify.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem833_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Executed route after BEM-832 results verification')
